description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a large, rectangular display framed by a slim, dark bezel. The front surface is dominated by the screen, which appears to have a matte finish to reduce glare. The monitor is supported by a wide, rectangular pedestal stand that provides stability and has a solid, geometric design. The rear of the monitor is plain, with a subtle horizontal line dividing the upper and lower sections, and no visible ports or buttons. The side views reveal the monitor's ultra-thin profile, with a slight bulge at the lower back where the stand connects. The overall appearance is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary office or home environments.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a thin bezel and a wide, rectangular pedestal stand. The design is minimalist, with a matte screen and no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, matte display area framed by a slim, dark bezel and the wide pedestal stand beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the monitor and the slight bulge at the lower back for the stand connection.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark back panel with a subtle horizontal division and the stand attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness and the stand's connection point.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, flat, and dark-colored, with a uniform thickness around the display and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base and a solid, geometric design, likely made of plastic with a possible metal core for stability.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
